name: ShopeePay Southeast Asia Digital Wallet API
what_it_does: ShopeePay (Sea Limited) Southeast Asia digital wallet REST API for merchants within the Shopee e-commerce ecosystem and external service partners to accept mobile wallet payments from ShopeePay's 200M+ wallet holders across Indonesia, Philippines, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Singapore, and Taiwan, enabling QR code payments, in-app checkout, ShopeePay Later BNPL, and merchant cashback through Sea Limited's integrated commerce and fintech platform. Enables AI agents to manage ShopeePay checkout for SEA mobile wallet payment automation, handle QR code generation for in-store ShopeePay payment automation, access payment confirmation for ShopeePay transaction verification automation, retrieve payment status for SEA wallet monitoring automation, manage refund processing for ShopeePay reversal automation, handle webhook notification for payment event automation, access ShopeePay Later for BNPL installment automation, retrieve merchant analytics for ShopeePay reporting automation, manage cashback and reward for loyalty automation, and integrate ShopeePay with Shopee marketplace, third-party merchant apps, and SEA commerce platforms for end-to-end SEA digital wallet payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting ShopeePay wallet payments from SEA consumers for Shopee and external checkout agents
Processing ShopeePay QR in-store payments for SEA retail and food merchant automation agents
Integrating ShopeePay Later BNPL for SEA consumer installment purchase automation agents
Receiving ShopeePay payment webhooks for SEA marketplace order fulfillment automation agents
not_for: Markets outside ShopeePay's SEA coverage (ShopeePay is Indonesia, PH, TH, VN, MY, SG, TW)
Non-Shopee merchant ecosystem deep integration (external merchant API access is limited)
International cross-border payments (ShopeePay is domestic per-country payment)
best_when: A Shopee marketplace seller or SEA merchant wanting AI agents to accept ShopeePay wallet payments from 200M+ SEA wallet users in Indonesia, Philippines, Thailand, and other SEA markets.
avoid_when: EXTERNAL MERCHANT API IS LIMITED: ShopeePay full API is primarily for Shopee ecosystem; automated external merchant full API access is restricted; automated standalone external merchant integration requires ShopeePay partner agreement and is limited in capabilities. COUNTRY-SPECIFIC ENDPOINTS: ShopeePay operates separately per country (different domains, regulatory entities); automated single-endpoint multi-country assumption creates region-specific access failure; automated multi-country integration requires country-specific credentials and endpoints. PAYMENT CONFIRMATION IS ASYNC: ShopeePay payment requires consumer to confirm in app; automated synchronous payment result creates premature success; automated must poll or await webhook for payment_completed. DOMESTIC CURRENCY ONLY: ShopeePay is domestic-currency per country (IDR, PHP, THB, etc.); automated single-currency cross-border assumption creates currency mismatch; automated must use local currency for each country.

auth.notes: ShopeePay uses OAuth 2.0 with partner_id and API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. Singapore HQ (Sea Limited). Sea Limited NYSE: SE. ShopeePay launched 2017. Products: Wallet, QR pay, ShopeePay Later (BNPL), cashback, transfer. Accessible primarily through Shopee marketplace; external merchant API via partnership. Local financial authority regulated per country (OJK, BSP, BOT, SBV, BNM, MAS, FSC). 200M+ wallet holders. Competes with GrabPay and GoPay for SEA wallet dominance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox via Shopee Open Platform for testing; production requires Sea/Shopee partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction fee negotiated by country and partner type; typically 0.5-2% per ShopeePay transaction
pricing.notes: Singapore HQ. Sea Limited (NYSE:SE). Country-specific regulatory. Transaction fee model. Multi-currency SEA.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per partner credential; payment APIs throttled by country; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED FOR EXTERNAL USE: ShopeePay full API access for external merchants requires Sea Limited/Shopee partner agreement; automated self-service external integration creates limited or no API access outside Shopee marketplace

COUNTRY-SPECIFIC ENDPOINTS AND CREDENTIALS: ShopeePay operates per country with different API endpoints; automated single global endpoint assumption creates region access failure; automated multi-country must use country-specific ShopeePay endpoints and credentials

PAYMENT CONFIRMATION IS ASYNC: ShopeePay payment requires consumer to confirm in ShopeePay app; automated synchronous confirmation creates premature success assumption; automated must poll payment status or await callback webhook

EACH COUNTRY HAS SEPARATE REGULATORY ENTITY: ShopeePay is regulated by different authority per country (OJK in Indonesia, BSP in Philippines, etc.); automated single-regulatory compliance assumption creates non-compliant operations in specific countries

DOMESTIC CURRENCY PER COUNTRY: ShopeePay amounts must be in local currency per country (IDR, PHP, THB, VND); automated USD payment assumption creates currency rejection; automated must specify local currency amounts for each deployment country
agent_readiness.security_notes: SEA digital wallet. Multi-country regulated (OJK, BSP, BOT, etc.). OAuth2. SEA. Wallet and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SEA wallet. Sea Limited. Multi-country regulated. OAuth2. SEA. Wallet and user payment data.
